Event: Royal Challenge - Season 50
Event Date: 01/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM349
Siege Collar Amulet

Once in a while, the unit gives a shield to self and all allied units in a large radius. This shield blocks 40% damage of any type. The shield exists for 4 sec. The ability's targets also have all their stats increased by 20% for 4 sec. Every second for 4 sec., the targets deal 215000 magic damage to 2 random enemy units, and restore health equal to 35% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
